uiReleaseCockpit.description: PHR UI release cockpit with comprehensive release readiness visualization and foundation usage display

environmentSelection.description: Select between local, staging, and production environments

overallStatusDisplay.description: Displays overall release readiness status with score and metrics

foundationUsageSection.description: Displays platform foundation readiness (Kernel, Data Cloud, plugins)
foundationUsageSection.refinement: PHR-010: Foundation usage section added with detailed plugin status display

blockingIssuesDisplay.description: Alert display for blocking issues with count and details

warningsDisplay.description: Alert display for warnings with count and details

evidenceCategoriesTab.description: Tabbed view of evidence categories with status, freshness, and references

gateStatusTab.description: Tabbed view of gate status with evidence references and environment tags

nextStepsTab.description: Tabbed view of next required work tasks

refreshCapability.description: Manual refresh button to reload release readiness data

loadingStates.description: Loading spinner and error handling states

freshnessHandling.description: Evidence freshness indicators with stale badges

changes: Added dedicated Foundation Usage card section
Displays Kernel, Data Cloud, and Plugins status
Shows last checked timestamps for each foundation component
Uses color-coded badges for status visualization
Icons for each foundation type (Shield for Kernel, Database for Data Cloud, Layers for Plugins)
benefits: Clear visibility into platform foundation readiness
